title: Storehouse Refill Calculator Schema
description: Schema for inputs (thresholds, par levels, planning horizon) and outputs (refill quantities, baskets, and refill timeline hints) used by the StorehouseRefillCalculator shim in Suka Smart Assistant.

StorehouseRefillInput.description: Inputs required to compute refill quantities and priorities.

householdId.description: Identifier for the household whose storehouse is being analyzed.

planningHorizonDays.description: Number of days ahead to consider when determining refill quantities and urgency.

minimumParLevels.description: Overrides or explicit minimum par levels keyed by itemId or itemKey.

safetyStockRules.description: Rules that define additional safety stock thresholds for specific items or categories.

plannedMeals.description: Optional set of planned meals that will consume storehouse inventory over the planning horizon.

batchPlans.description: Optional set of upcoming batch cooking or preservation plans that affect inventory demand.

priceBookSnapshot.description: Optional snapshot of price data used to form refill baskets and cost estimates.

StorehouseSnapshot.description: Snapshot of current storehouse inventory by item.

StorehouseItemLevel.description: Represents the inventory status for a single item in the storehouse.

category.description: Category such as grains, meats, oils, spices, hair-care, or household supplies.

location.description: Storage location string (e.g., pantry, rootCellar, freezerA, bathroomCabinet).

uom.description: Unit of measure for quantity (e.g., kg, lb, oz, g, L, mL, count).

currentQty.description: Current on-hand quantity in the given unit of measure.

reservedQty.description: Quantity already reserved for planned meals or sessions.

parLevel.description: Configured par level for this item, if any.

reorderMultiple.description: Preferred purchase increment (e.g., 1 case, 0.5 kg). Used to round refill quantities.

leadTimeDays.description: Typical lead time in days for refilling this item.

notes.description: Optional notes on this item, including brand or usage notes (e.g., Black hair-focused oils, butters, and grains).

SafetyStockRule.description: Rule defining extra safety stock thresholds or higher service levels for items or categories.

category.description: Category to which this rule applies when appliesTo is 'category'.

itemId.description: Item ID to which this rule applies when appliesTo is 'item'.

minDaysOfCover.description: Minimum number of days of coverage required by this rule.

serviceLevel.description: Target service level (0–1) used to prioritize avoiding stockouts.

PlannedMealRef.description: Minimal reference to a planned meal that affects inventory demand.

recipeId.description: Identifier of the recipe driving this meal.

BatchPlanRef.description: Minimal reference to a batch cooking or preservation plan.

PriceBookEntryRef.description: Minimal pricebook entry used for cost estimates and store-based baskets.

FamilyPreferenceSet.description: High-level family preferences that can influence refill priorities (e.g., Black hair nutrition focus, whole-food priorities, budget rules).

prioritizeHairNutritionItems.description: When true, items that support hair and scalp health (oils, protein sources, grains, fruits/veggies) may be bumped to higher urgency.

StorehouseRefillOutput.description: Results from the StorehouseRefillCalculator including per-item refill lines and summary metrics.

refillLines.description: Per-item refill recommendations with quantities and urgency.

priorityBaskets.description: Optional store- or category-based baskets to help structure shopping runs.

timelineHints.description: Optional timeline hints for when items should be purchased to avoid stockouts.

hubExportPayload.description: Optional Hub packet payload that can be sent if familyFundMode is enabled.

RefillLine.description: Recommended refill for a single item.

refillQty.description: Quantity that should be refilled in the given unit of measure.

urgency.description: How urgent it is to refill this item within the planning horizon.

reasonCodes.description: Machine-readable reasons for why this item appears in the refill plan.

notes.description: Optional user-facing explanation or Black hair nutrition note for this item (e.g., oils, proteins, grains that support hair health).

RefillBasket.description: Logical grouping of refill lines, often by store, section, or priority.

storeId.description: Optional store identifier for this basket if it is store-specific.

RefillBasketLineRef.description: Minimal reference to a refill line from within a basket.

RefillTimelineHint.description: Hint for when a refill should be purchased to avoid stockout risks.

riskIfDelayed.description: Short explanation of the risk if purchase is delayed past the recommended date.

StorehouseRefillSummary.description: Summary metrics for the refill plan.

totalRefillQty.description: Sum of all refill quantities (normalized to an internal reference unit where applicable).
